title: MTR - Moog's Temples Reimagined
description: Discover large, rare temples filled with challenging encounters, valuable loot, and exciting exploration that will test your skills and reward your bravery
body:
![banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Moogs_Temples_Reimagined/MP_MoogsTemplesReimagined_header.webp)

[![Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/D1D8LKA5N)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/869218732650688543?color=008080&label=DISCORD&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.com/invite/S5nffJbuvA)

[![My projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-projects-008080?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/finndog_123/projects)

[![My projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-projects-008080?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/FinnDog_123)

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Moogs_Temples_Reimagined/MP_MoogsTemplesReimagined_overview.webp)

This Mod works for Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge! Make sure to check what versions [Moogs Structure Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-structure-lib) is avilable for.

### ABOUT

Moog's Temples Reimagined replaces the vanilla temple structures with larger, overhauled versions. It adds desert, jungle, ocean, badlands, and nether temples, plus a custom stronghold. Built on MoogsStructureLib.

To see the villages, head to the [previews website](https://previews.moogsmods.com/temples-reimagined/1.21.1/).

### REQUIREMENTS

**MoogsStructureLib** - This mod requires [MoogsStructureLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-structure-lib) to function. Please ensure it is installed alongside this mod.

![features & showcase](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Moogs_Temples_Reimagined/MP_MoogsTemplesReimagined_features.webp)

### STRUCTURES

*   **Desert Temple**
*   **Jungle Temple**
*   **Ocean Temple**
*   **Badlands Temple**
*   **Nether Temple**
*   **Stronghold**

![collage](https://pub-24a4e0e7ea8544a5b6f73c3a23512589.r2.dev/images/7edc1556b8934fe38ccc3179e2365c3c.png)
